metadata.policy: Core rankings are based on pricing data and capabilities, not payment.

options.label: Price change alerts
options.audience: AI builders, CTOs, and platform teams monitoring LLM API costs
options.value: Email alerts when model prices, context windows, or cache-read discounts change.
options.trust_note: Alerts must link back to the source snapshot and remind users to verify provider pages.

options.label: Premium data API
options.audience: Teams building LLM routing, FinOps dashboards, or internal AI platforms
options.value: Higher refresh frequency, pricing history, diff alerts, and machine-readable change logs.
options.trust_note: The free public pricing snapshot remains available.

options.label: Clearly labeled provider sponsorship
options.audience: LLM API providers and infrastructure companies
options.value: Clearly labeled sponsorship placements that do not alter organic price ranking.
options.trust_note: Sponsored content must be visually separated and machine-readable as sponsored.

not_for_sale: Claims that prices are final provider invoices
